name: NetBird
description: Imports the device inventory from NetBird, the open-source WireGuard-based zero-trust mesh network (https://netbird.io). Each NetBird peer becomes an ASSET — its DNS label / hostname, overlay IP, operating system, agent version, connectivity and groups. Offline mode: parse a `GET /api/peers` JSON export saved from the NetBird Management API. Live mode: if `api_token` is set, the worker calls the NetBird Management API (self-hosted `management_url` or the NetBird cloud) read-only to list peers. No DB access in run.py (worker-safe); the runner performs the ASSET writes. Feeds Asset Management with the mesh-connected endpoints.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a NetBird `GET /api/peers` JSON response (array, or an object with a `data`/`peers` array) to import.

parameters.name: api_token
parameters.help: Live mode: a NetBird Management API personal access token / service-user token (sent as `Authorization: Token …`). Read-only peer listing.

parameters.name: management_url
parameters.help: NetBird Management API base URL (self-hosted, e.g. https://netbird.example.com). Defaults to the NetBird cloud API.
